## New Skill: `{skill-name}`

### Category
<!-- Foundation / Outbound & Email / Prospecting / Data Extraction / Voice & Writing -->

### Description
<!-- One sentence, under 200 characters -->

### Checklist
- [ ] `skills/{name}/SKILL.md` exists with valid frontmatter
- [ ] Name is lowercase kebab-case
- [ ] Name in frontmatter matches directory name
- [ ] Description is under 200 characters
- [ ] Trigger phrases section included
- [ ] SKILL.md is under 500 lines
- [ ] No personal data (names, emails, API keys, absolute paths)
- [ ] All file references use relative paths
- [ ] References/ files are linked from SKILL.md
- [ ] Version added to VERSIONS.md
